title: AST Snowmachine/Musher collision: Galena [AK20015147]
summary: Update: The driver of snowmachine contacted AST and is cooperating with the ongoing investigation. Original Text: On 3/2/2020, Alaska State Troopers in Galena received a report that a musher who was participating in the Serum Run was struck the night prior, at approximately 2030 hours, by a snowmachiner about five miles outside of Galena. Investigation revealed that Kirsten Bey, 64 of Nome, was mushing to Galena from Ruby when she was struck by an unknown snowmachiner. Another participant, riding snowmachine, came upon the scene shortly after and helped transport Bey to Galena. The snowmachiner that hit the musher remained on scene until Bey was transported away. Bey was medivaced from Galena to the Fairbanks Medical Hospital with significant injuries. The incident is under investigation.
